message:
fix(codegen): Only consider direct usage and capture for param discard

Shadowing checks (shadows_module_level, shadows_class_member, etc.)
should only affect HOW to name a used param (e.g., add suffix), not
WHETHER to discard it. Previously, params that shadow something were
always marked as used even if not actually referenced.

Now only is_used_directly and is_captured determine if param is used.
